appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md denial-flow guidance to treat requester-side OperationFailure as contract-critical and avoid assuming a guaranteed local A-side peer_denied runtime event.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow scoped validator profiles for scrutiny fix features that are logic/e2e-spec-only so workers can satisfy procedure without artificial agent-browser or full-suite deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-m3-default-policy-no-clobber-race-eager-drop and fix-m3-denial-roundtrip-15s-from-dispatch reviews reported skill-procedure mismatch because current ui-screen-worker/runtime-worker steps are broader than these narrowly scoped fixes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Two separate skill-procedure mismatch observations from this round (ui-screen-worker and runtime-worker variants).
